_meta.title: QueueStorm Investigator — Public Sample Case Pack
_meta.event: SUST CSE Carnival 2026 · Codex Community Hackathon · Online Preliminary

cases.label: Wrong transfer with matching evidence

input.complaint: I sent 5000 taka to a wrong number around 2pm today. The number was supposed to be 01712345678 but I think I typed it wrong. The person isn't responding to my call. Please help me get my money back.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer reports sending 5000 BDT via TXN-9101 to +8801719876543, which they now believe was the wrong recipient. Recipient is unresponsive.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Verify TXN-9101 details with the customer and initiate the wrong-transfer dispute workflow per policy.
expected_output.customer_reply: We have noted your concern about transaction TXN-9101. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone. Our dispute team will review the case and contact you through official support channels.

cases.rationale: Complaint amount (5000) and approximate time (2pm) align cleanly with TXN-9101.

cases.label: Wrong transfer claim with inconsistent evidence

input.complaint: I sent 2000 to the wrong person by mistake. Please reverse it.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer claims TXN-9202 (2000 BDT to +8801812345678) was a wrong transfer, but transaction history shows three prior transfers to the same counterparty.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Flag for human review. Verify with the customer whether this was genuinely a wrong transfer.
expected_output.customer_reply: We have received your request regarding transaction TXN-9202. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone. Our dispute team will review the case carefully.

cases.rationale: Repeated past transfers contradict the wrong transfer claim.

cases.label: Failed payment with balance deducted

input.complaint: I tried to pay 1200 taka for my mobile recharge but the app showed failed. But my balance was deducted! Please refund my money.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer attempted a 1200 BDT mobile recharge (TXN-9301) which failed, but reports balance was deducted.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Investigate TXN-9301 ledger status. If balance was deducted on a failed payment, initiate the automatic reversal flow.
expected_output.customer_reply: We have noted that transaction TXN-9301 may have caused an unexpected balance deduction. Our payments team will review the case and any eligible amount will be returned through official channels.

cases.rationale: Clear payment failure with claimed balance deduction.

cases.label: Refund request requiring safe handling

input.complaint: I paid 500 to a merchant for a product but I changed my mind and don't want it anymore. Please refund my 500 taka.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer requests refund of 500 BDT for TXN-9401 due to change of mind.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Inform the customer that refund eligibility depends on the merchant's own policy.
expected_output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. Refunds for completed merchant payments depend on the merchant's own policy. We recommend contacting the merchant directly.

cases.rationale: The service must NOT promise a refund it cannot authorize.

cases.label: Phishing or social engineering report

input.complaint: Someone called me saying they are from bKash and asked for my OTP. They said my account will be blocked if I don't share it. Is this real? I haven't shared anything yet.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer reports an unsolicited call claiming to be from the company and asking for OTP.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Escalate to fraud_risk team immediately. Confirm to customer that the company never asks for OTP.
expected_output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out before sharing any information. We never ask for your PIN, OTP, or password under any circumstances.

cases.rationale: Phishing reports are critical severity by default.

cases.label: Vague complaint, insufficient evidence

input.complaint: Something is wrong with my money. Please check.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer reports a vague concern about their money without specifying transaction, amount, or issue.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Reply to customer asking for specific details: which transaction, what amount, what went wrong.
expected_output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. To help you faster, please share the transaction ID, the amount involved, and a short description of what went wrong.

cases.rationale: Without specifics, the service should not guess.

input.complaint: আমি আজ সকালে এজেন্টের কাছে ২০০০ টাকা ক্যাশ ইন করেছি কিন্তু আমার ব্যালেন্সে টাকা আসেনি। এজেন্ট বলছে টাকা পাঠিয়েছে কিন্তু আমি দেখছি না।

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer reports 2000 BDT cash-in via AGENT-318 (TXN-9701) not reflected in balance.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Investigate TXN-9701 pending status with agent operations.
expected_output.customer_reply: আপনার লেনদেন TXN-9701 এর বিষয়ে আমরা অবগত হয়েছি। আমাদের এজেন্ট অপারেশন্স দল এটি দ্রুত যাচাই করবে এবং অফিসিয়াল চ্যানেলে আপনাকে জানাবে।

cases.label: Multiple plausible transactions, ambiguous match

input.complaint: I sent 1000 to my brother yesterday but he says he didn't get it. Please check.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer reports a 1000 BDT transfer to their brother was not received. Multiple transactions exist.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Reply to customer asking for the brother's number to identify the correct transaction.
expected_output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. We see multiple transactions of 1000 BDT on that date. Could you share your brother's number?

cases.rationale: When multiple transactions match, do not guess.

input.complaint: I am a merchant. My yesterday's sales of 15000 taka have not been settled to my account. Settlement usually happens by 11am next day. Please check.

expected_output.agent_summary: Merchant reports yesterday's 15000 BDT settlement (TXN-9901) is delayed.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Route to merchant_operations to verify settlement batch status.
expected_output.customer_reply: We have noted your concern about settlement TXN-9901. Our merchant operations team will check the batch status.

cases.label: Duplicate payment claim

input.complaint: I paid my electricity bill 850 taka but it deducted twice from my account. Please check, I only paid once.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer reports duplicate electricity bill payment. Two identical 850 BDT payments completed 12 seconds apart.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Verify the duplicate with payments_ops. Initiate reversal of TXN-10002 if confirmed.
expected_output.customer_reply: We have noted the possible duplicate payment for transaction TXN-10002. Our payments team will verify and any eligible amount will be returned through official channels.

cases.rationale: Two identical payments within 12 seconds strongly indicate a duplicate.
